# F060 Floor-Direction-Projected Row-Wise Residual

## Decision
`F060_FLOOR_DIRECTION_PROJECTION_SAFE_BUT_WEAK`

## Purpose
F059 showed that row-wise residuals preserve retrieval and improve delta metrics, but transition-source cosine improvement is unstable. F060 tests a small geometry constraint: project the learned residual onto the positive ridge floor-delta direction before applying the train-only row-wise abstention rule.

## Projection
Positive projection of learned residual onto the train-only ridge floor-delta direction before row-wise abstention.

## Mean Metrics
- selected nonzero fraction: `1.000000`
- row-wise active fraction mean: `0.888889`
- row-wise effective scale mean: `0.029444`
- heldout local floor preserved: `True`
- active gates pass: `True`
- selected transition: `0.352199`
- floor transition: `0.352177`
- selected delta cosine: `0.886440`
- floor delta cosine: `0.886440`
- selected recall@1: `0.901235`
- floor recall@1: `0.901235`
- selected floor gap transition: `0.000022` (min `-0.000020`, std `0.000051`)
- selected floor gap delta cosine: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`, std `0.000000`)
- selected floor gap recall: `0.000000` (min `0.000000`, std `0.000000`)
- negative transition seeds: `2`
- heldout broken rows: `0`
